# Sara N. Johnson

> Profile page for Sara N. Johnson, CEO of Mission 22 (legal name: ElderHeart Inc., EIN 46-2750726). Subject of Oregon DOJ Civil Enforcement investigation, Matter No. 137300XCT0036-20.

## Identity

- Full Name: Sara N. Johnson
- Also Known As: Sara Dawdy
- Title: CEO, Mission 22
- Location: Sisters, Central Oregon
- Spouse: Magnus Johnson (Board President / Chief Vision Officer, Mission 22)

## Organization

- Public Name: Mission 22
- Legal Name: ElderHeart Inc.
- EIN: 46-2750726
- Oregon Charity Registration: #51902
- Website: mission22.com

## Key Facts

- Sara Johnson served as CEO of Mission 22 for over a decade, stepped back, and returned as CEO in April 2026.
- On the FY2024 Form 990 (filed Oct. 2025), she is not listed as an officer — instead reported as an independent contractor paid $231,269 for "consultant" services, disclosed on Schedule L as a transaction with an interested person (former director).
- Magnus Johnson is listed on the same filing as Chief Vision Officer with identical W-2 compensation of $231,269.
- The Oregon DOJ investigated ElderHeart Inc. under Matter No. 137300XCT0036-20. The public report, signed by AAG Mark Kleyna on May 19, 2021, flagged below-market rent, related-party control, mission drift, and potential excess benefit transactions under IRC § 4958.

## Image

- URL: https://sarajohnson.info/sara-n-johnson-ceo-mission-22-elderheart.jpg
- Description: Sara N. Johnson, CEO of Mission 22 (ElderHeart Inc.), a veterans nonprofit under Oregon DOJ investigation.
